samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="size">4</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <task>
        <description>Extend input signals.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter name="i">Loop index.</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <assign name="extend_a">Concatenate (mul_a, size zeros)</assign>
            <assign name="extend_b">Concatenate (mul_b, size zeros)</assign>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <assign name="partial_product[0]">
        <description>Calculate partial product for bit position 0.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>bit_mul_b[0] == 1</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="extend_a[3:0]">Left shift mul_a by 0 positions</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="partial_product[1]">
        <description>Calculate partial product for bit position 1.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>bit_mul_b[1] == 1</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="extend_a[3:0]">Left shift mul_a by 1 position</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="partial_product[2]">
        <description>Calculate partial product for bit position 2.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>bit_mul_b[2] == 1</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="extend_a[3:0]">Left shift mul_a by 2 positions</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="partial_product[3]">
        <description>Calculate partial product for bit position 3.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>bit_mul_b[3] == 1</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="extend_a[3:0]">Left shift mul_a by 3 positions</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="sum[0]">
        <description>Calculate sum for stage 0.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>rst_n == 0</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="partial_product[0]">partial_product[0]</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="sum[1]">
        <description>Calculate sum for stage 1.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>rst_n == 0</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]">partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="sum[2]">
        <description>Calculate sum for stage 2.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>rst_n == 0</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]">partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="sum[3]">
        <description>Calculate sum for stage 3.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>rst_n == 0</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="partial_product[3] + partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]">partial_product[3] + partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    <assign name="mul_out">
        <description>Calculate final product.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>rst_n == 0</condition>
            <then>
                <assign name="0">0</assign>
            </then>
            <else>
                <assign name="sum[3] + partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]">sum[3] + partial_product[2] + partial_product[1] + partial_product[0]</assign>
            </then>
        </if>
    </assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
